name: anki-flashcard-generator
description: Web application for generating Anki flashcards from notes using AI

scripts.server: cd server && PORT=5001 npm run dev
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && echo 'Setup complete! Copy server/env.example to server/.env and add your API keys.'

author: Daniel Wait
